arms_mandatory_baselines: explication-text-interleaved-data-arm (else the win is curriculum, not architecture)

dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

n_planned.instrument_repair: pre-registered at this record's freeze: what changes vs E1 + the instrument's own pass bar (trained arms must beat step-0 cloze before any between-arm read); a second INSTRUMENT-INVALID after the repair scores HE6 undetermined-not-supporting in a-h0 (RT-19), never as support, and buys no further replication

endpoints.test: tokens-to-target ratio vs trainable baseline, <=0.8x bound; TOST on the ratio per P8 §1.5 row 3 (log-ratio 90% CI within ±10% of parity = NULL); 5 paired seeds; E1 single-look rule carries over
pre-registered instrument check: trained arms beat step-0 cloze

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HE6 (verbatim): Measured range: 5M–160M (T0–T2). Envelope: ≤410M (T3) at most; explicitly UNLICENSED beyond: no published scaling study of frozen-embedding convergence penalties exists (L3 open question). Anchor: The one hypothesis where the literature provides no anchor at all — envelope hard-capped at the top measured rung until T3 runs.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §3 HE6 kill criterion (verbatim): 'M3-vector dead if the ≤0.8× bound fails (TOST) vs trainable, or if the text-data arm matches the vector arm (text-arm survival alone is filed as M3-data — a data result, not an architecture result). T2 (160M) is the smallest decisive rung — frozen-embedding convergence penalties are documented ≥100M; toy wins gate spending, decide nothing.' Absorption is NOT a kill (InstructRetro logic). P1 §1(d) carve-out: a repeated instrument failure after the pre-registered repair scores HE6 undetermined-not-supporting for H0-NO.

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/
corpus_hashes.scaffold-corpus: PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-ts (TinyStories pipeline reuse, parity-gated mapper port, 5 paired seeds + text-interleaved arm corpus)

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: F6 — kernel scaffolding cuts training tokens-to-target (HE6; E1 design + text-scaffold arm; pre-registered instrument repair vs E1 encoded as verdict rule 0; T2=160M is the smallest decisive rung)
